data.name: Hentai Neko Mosaic!
data.detailed_description:
HENTAI MOSAIC WITH HOT GIRLS!


Collect a complete collection of beautiful kitty girls. The game will help you relax and unwind in the company of immodest little animals :)

COLLECTION OF UNIQUE GIRLS IN ACHIEVEMENTS


Features

  • Lots of quality kitty girls
  • Interesting levels
  • CG Gallery mode

Thank you so much for supporting this game.
If you liked this game, please recommend it and write a comment, thanks again!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WINDOWS® 7 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3 Serise or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
  • 備註: This requirements are not final
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WINDOWS® 7 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5 Serise or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
  • 備註: This requirements are not final
